net.sf.saxon.trans

Interface BuiltInRuleSet

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DeepCopyRuleSet, DeepSkipRuleSet, FailRuleSet, RuleSetWithWarnings, ShallowCopyRuleSet, ShallowSkipRuleSet, TextOnlyCopyRuleSet

    public interface BuiltInRuleSet
    Defines a set of built-in template rules (rules for use when no user-defined template rules match a given node)

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DEEP_COPY 
      static int DEEP_SKIP 
      static int FAIL 
      static int SHALLOW_COPY 
      static int SHALLOW_SKIP 
      static int TEXT_COPY

      int getDefaultAction(int nodeKind)
      Get the default action for unmatched nodes
      void process(Item item, ParameterSet parameters, ParameterSet tunnelParams, XPathContext context, int locationId)

    • Method Detail

      • process

        void process(Item item,
           ParameterSet parameters,
           ParameterSet tunnelParams,
           XPathContext context,
           int locationId)
             throws XPathException
        Perform the built-in template action for a given item.
        Parameters:
        item - the item to be processed
        parameters - the parameters supplied to apply-templates
        tunnelParams - the tunnel parameters to be passed through
        context - the dynamic evaluation context
        locationId - location of the instruction (apply-templates, apply-imports etc) that caused the built-in template to be invoked
        Throws:
        XPathException - if any dynamic error occurs

      • getDefaultAction

        int getDefaultAction(int nodeKind)
        Get the default action for unmatched nodes
        Parameters:
        nodeKind - the node kind
        Returns:
        the default action for unmatched element nodes: one of DEEP_COPY, APPLY_TEMPLATES, DEEP_SKIP, FAIL
